description: Agentic org teams (Spec 0014). Teams are defined in packages/agentkit/agentkit/teams.py; this file is the operator-facing schedule + model policy. Run: uv run python -m agentkit run <id> [--loop MINUTES].

model.note: Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works; without a key, teams run deterministic duties only.

teams.notes: Watch-tick + dataset inventory every 6h; LLM curates sources.
Queue triage + telemetry review twice daily; feeds the delegate lanes.
Daily blockers report + platform health + Operator digest.
